notes: v1.14.74 - Ghost Echo quirk portability (roadmap P0 #1, multi-DCT lens): the tribal-knowledge corpus (phantom_ghost_echo_v1) can now MOVE between techs. Added exportGhostQuirks/importGhostQuirks (import merges another tech's quirks into the previously-dead 'incoming' peer layer, dedup + provenance), folded ghostQuirks into the full-backup bundle + restore, and added Export/Import Quirks buttons (fix-log buttons relabeled Export/Import Log). Fixed ge_findQuirks (#2): outgoing matched on a tolerant normalized siteId, imported incoming no longer site-gated so cross-site peer knowledge actually surfaces. No change to capture/local-retrieve or the IndexedDB fix-log.
